name: Making Foil Handles
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear off three 20 x 3-inch strips of heavy-duty aluminum foil or use regular foil folded for double thickness.
2. Crisscross the foil strips in a spoke design.
To prepare meals that require lifting from the Crock-Pot:
- If preparing a Mexican tortilla stack meal, place the foil strips in a spoke design in the Crock-Pot. Then layer the tortillas and meat and cheese mixtures on top of the foil in the Crock-Pot.
- If preparing a meat loaf, place the foil handles on a large sheet of waxed paper. Shape the meat loaf on the spoke design. Lift the ends of the handles to transfer the loaf to the Crock-Pot.
3. When ready to serve, simply lift the foil handles from the Crock-Pot and remove the meal to a serving dish.
